PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel(SUM(xsd:integer(?losses)) AS ?totalLosses) WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P118 wd:Q43511 .
  ?season wdt:P2011 ?standings .
  ?standings p:P5123 ?teamStatement .
  ?teamStatement ps:P5123 ?team .
  ?teamStatement pq:P1356 ?losses .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel
    FILTER(lang(?teamLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
GROUP BY ?team ?teamLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?totalLosses)
LIMIT 1
